# Gamma

Gamma extends [[alpha]] with additional ranging behavior. Where alpha
defines the baseline, gamma layers compensation logic on top.

## Multi-hop chain

Gamma -> Alpha -> Beta is the canonical citation chain used by the
multi-hop tests in `tests/fixtures/eval_fixtures.jsonl`.
